description: Default MCP server and plugin configurations for OpenCode

plugins.NOTE: Add plugins to opencode.json plugin array. Order matters - opencode-websearch-cited should be LAST.

opencode-pty.description: Interactive PTY management - run background processes, send input, read output with regex filtering

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-pty"

opencode-agent-skills.description: Dynamic skills plugin - auto-discovers skills from project, user, and plugin directories

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-agent-skills"

opencode-supermemory.description: Persistent memory - agent remembers context across sessions

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-supermemory"

superpowers.description: Software development workflow with composable skills

setup.step1: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "superpowers@git+https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git"
setup.step3: Verify: ask 'Tell me about your superpowers'

opencode-websearch-cited.description: LLM-grounded web search with inline citations

setup.NOTE: Add LAST in plugin list to avoid impacting other plugins' auth process
setup.step3: Configure websearch_cited model in provider options
